title: Inline cost + token footer per turn (env-gated, stderr)
current_state: Token counts (t_in, t_out) and total_cost are computed at the end of every root turn in _respond_via_config (pi_agent.py:1071) and logged to evolution.jsonl via self._async_log. The user never sees them during the turn. Claude Code shows '$0.04 Â· 8.2k tokens' inline; Pi shows nothing.
structural_problem: Invisible cost = no in-the-loop steering. User can't notice expensive turns mid-conversation to course-correct. Visible cost = visible budget discipline.
target_state: When PI_SHOW_COST=on, after the final response is computed in _respond_via_config (step 6), print a one-line footer to stderr (NOT into final_text): '[$0.0034 Â· 8120 tok in Â· 1240 out Â· sonnet Â· 1.4s]'. Never appears in returned final_text so Telegram + voice paths stay clean. Default OFF.
files_affected: pi_agent.py â€” single conditional print at end of _respond_via_config
README.md â€” one line under env vars / commands
design_notes: Footer line goes to sys.stderr, NOT into the returned string. Telegram and voice consume final_text only â€” they never see it.
Format: '[${cost:.4f} Â· {t_in} tok in Â· {t_out} out Â· {provider/model} Â· {duration:.1f}s]'
Behind env flag PI_SHOW_COST. Default unset = off. Documented in README env-vars section.
Wrap in try/except (Inv. 9 turn-log non-fatal contract by analogy) â€” never crash a turn over a print failure.
Only fires when cfg.public_logging is True. God mode (public_logging=False) never prints â€” protects privacy.
success_criteria: PI_SHOW_COST=on root turn prints footer to stderr with cost + token counts
PI_SHOW_COST unset â†’ no footer, no overhead
God mode never prints regardless of PI_SHOW_COST
final_text returned to caller never contains footer string (test asserts this)
risk_notes: Lowest risk in Tier 1. No state mutation, no schema, no new calls. Only addition is one conditional print after step 6.
migration_plan: 1. Add format_cost_footer(cost, t_in, t_out, model, duration_s) -> str helper (could live in agent/status_line.py if shipped first, else inline).
2. In _respond_via_config after duration_s/total_cost computation: if cfg.public_logging and os.environ.get('PI_SHOW_COST') == 'on': print(footer, file=sys.stderr, flush=True).
3. Test: footer string matches expected format; not in final_text.
